2604.26221.title: Seeking Consensus: Geometric-Semantic On-the-Fly Recalibration for Open-Vocabulary Remote Sensing Semantic Segmentation
2604.26221.paper_summary: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation (OVSS) in remote sensing images is a promising task that employs textual descriptions for identifying undefined land cover categories. Despite notable advances, existing methods typically employ a static inference paradigm, overlooking the distinct distribution of each scene, resulting in semantic ambiguity in diverse land covers and incomplete foreground activation. Motivated by this, we propose Seeking Consensus, termed SeeCo, a plug-and-play framework to boost the performance of training-free OVSS models in remote sensing images, which recalibrates arbitrary OVSS models on-the-fly by seeking dual consensus: geometric consensus learning (GCL) through multi-view consistent observations and semantic consensus learning (SCL) via textual description adaptive calibration, which assists collaborative recalibration of visual and textual semantics. The two consensus are injected via an online consensus injector (OCI), effectively alleviating the under-activation and semantic bias. SeeCo requires no specific training process, yet recalibrates semantic-geometric alignment for each unique scene during inference. Extensive experiments on eight remote sensing OVSS benchmarks show consistent gains, proving its effectiveness and universality.
2604.26221.paper_summary_zh: 開放詞彙語義分割（OVSS）在遙感影像中的應用是一項有前景的任務，它利用文本描述來識別未定義的土地覆蓋類別。儘管取得了顯著的進展，現有的方法通常採用靜態推斷範式，忽視了每個場景的獨特分佈，導致不同土地覆蓋的語義模糊和不完整的前景激活。基於此，我們提出了尋求共識（Seeking Consensus），稱為 SeeCo，一個即插即用的框架，用於提升無需訓練的 OVSS 模型在遙感影像中的性能，通過尋求雙重共識來即時重新校準任意 OVSS 模型：通過多視角一致觀察的幾何共識學習（GCL）和通過文本描述自適應校準的語義共識學習（SCL），這有助於視覺和文本語義的協同重新校準。這兩種共識通過在線共識注入器（OCI）注入，有效減輕了激活不足和語義偏差。SeeCo 不需要特定的訓練過程，但在推斷期間為每個獨特場景重新校準語義-幾何對齊。在八個遙感 OVSS 基準上的廣泛實驗顯示出一致的增益，證明了其有效性和普遍性。
2604.26221.author: Guanchun Wang et.al.
2604.26221.authors: Guanchun Wang, Chenxiao Wu, Xiangrong Zhang, Zelin Peng, Jianxun Lai, Tianyang Zhang, Xu Tang
